symptom: Press failing to reach full tonnage, cycle time increased by ~20%
root_cause: Pressure relief valve had drifted below setpoint due to spring fatigue
action_taken: Replaced pressure relief valve cartridge (HPX-PRV-14), recalibrated at TP-2

symptom: Hydraulic fluid temperature alarm during second shift, fluid running hot
root_cause: Heat exchanger fins clogged with dust, restricting airflow
action_taken: Cleaned heat exchanger, replaced return-line filter as preventive step

symptom: Ram creeping down slowly during dwell phase on deep-draw parts
root_cause: Worn rod seal on ram cylinder allowing internal leakage
action_taken: Rebuilt ram cylinder with seal kit, verified drift under 0.2mm/60s

symptom: Y-axis following error during high-speed contour cuts
root_cause: Y-axis servo encoder feedback degraded, intermittent signal dropout
action_taken: Replaced Y-axis encoder assembly, ran backlash verification

symptom: Tool changer intermittently failing to seat tools, occasional dropped tool alarm
root_cause: Worn ATC gripper jaw no longer holding tool holder securely
action_taken: Replaced ATC gripper, checked air pressure regulator at 87 PSI (nominal)

symptom: Loud whining noise from pump at startup, especially cold mornings
root_cause: Suction strainer partially clogged causing pump cavitation
action_taken: Replaced suction strainer, verified reservoir fluid level
